title: Free Floating IHC Fluorescent Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"tmpq","text":"This protocol is optimized for to stain free floating sections for fluorescent labelling. Please note than each step must be done on a shaker. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Using a 12-well plate with buckets, wash sections 3x10min TBS
Block in 5% serum in TBST for 1hour at RT (using approx 2mL per well)
Using approx 500uL per well, let sections wash in primary antibody solution in TBST + 1% serum overnight in 4 °C
Incubate in secondary antibody (1:1000 for Invitrogen-brand or 1:2000 for BioRad-brand in TBST + 1%serum) for 2 hours @ RT in the dark. Approx 2mL per well.
Mount and allow slides to dry. Coverslip once sections are completely dried on the slide (.
Depending on antibody of choice, do an antigen retrieval step. Antigen retrieval in TBS: 10mM sodium citrate 0.05% Tween-20
creator: Jhodi Webster
